zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham於1475年出生在英國薩默塞特布利其沃特時，她的父親Henry Percy Boyle25歲，母親Matilda Herbert27歲。她於1494年與Sir William Hill在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年5月15日在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特享年60歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham于1475年出生在英国薩默塞特布利其沃特时，她的父亲Henry Percy Boyle25岁，母亲Matilda Herbert27岁。她于1494年与Sir William Hill在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年5月15日在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特享年60岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Buckingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the former county seat of the county of Buckinghamshire, Old English Buccingahamm ‘water meadow (Old English hamm) of the people of (-inga-) Bucc(a)’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Somerset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the English county of Somerset, which takes its name from Somerton in Somerset (see Summerton ) + Old English sǣte ‘settlers, dwellers’. The Somerset family who are Dukes of Beaufort are descended from the Plantagenets. The surname was assumed by Charles Somerset (1460–1520), illegitimate son of Henry Beaufort, Duke of Somerset. The latter was himself descended illegitimately from Edward III through John of Gaunt. A later member of the family was Fitzroy Somerset (1788–1855), who, as Lord Raglan, was the commander of British forces in the Crimea, one of the men responsible for the charge of the Light Brigade.

possibly a habitational name from one or more places called with Old Norse sumar ‘summer’ + sætr ‘shieling, hill pasture’, such as Summerseat in Elton (Lancashire), but decisive northern early bearers are lacking.

variants.name: Summerton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Somerton, particularly in Oxfordshire and Somerset, but also in Lincolnshire and Norfolk, named with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham was born in 1475, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, her father, Henry Percy Boyle, was 25 and her mother, Matilda Herbert, was 27. She married Sir William Hill in 1494, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 May 1535, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham est née en 1475, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy Boyle, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda Herbert, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hill en 1494, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1535, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham 1475 in Bridgwater, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Percy Boyle 25 und ihre Mutter Matilda Herbert 27. Sie hat 1494 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir William Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1535 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England und wurde in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham è nata il nel 1475 nel Bridgwater, Somerset, England, sua padre, Henry Percy Boyle, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Matilda Herbert, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Hill nel 1494, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1535, nel Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckinghamが1475年にイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで生まれた時，父Henry Percy Boyleは25歳，母Matilda Herbertは27歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンでSir William Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年5月15日にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットで60歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham(이)가 1475년 영국 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Percy Boyle(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Herbert(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 Sir William Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 5월 15일 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham nasceu em 1475, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy Boyle, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Herbert, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Hill em 1494, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1535, em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham родилась в 1475 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Percy Boyle было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Herbert, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hill в 1494 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 мая 1535 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham nació en 1475, en Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy Boyle, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Matilda Herbert, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William Hill en 1494, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1535, en Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra.
